title: Toad
content:
{{MCUVariant}} {{DOFP|Toad/Revised Timeline|Toad}} {{Gallery}} {{Character |image = Toad Crop.png|1973 Toad1.jpg|2000s |real name = Mortimer Toynbee |alias = Toad |species = [[Mutant]] |gender = Male |DOD = [[2000s|2004]] |affiliation = United States Armed Forces
[[Brotherhood of Mutants]] |status = Deceased |movie = ''[[X-Men (film)|X-Men]]''
''[[X2: X-Men United]]'' (mentioned)
''[[X-Men: Days of Future Past]]'' |game = ''[[X-Men: The Official Game]]'' ({{WPS|Game Boy Advance}} version only) |comic = ''[[X-Men: The Movie Prequel: Magneto]]''
''[[X-Men: The Movie Prequel: Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Ray Park]] (''[[X-Men (film)|X-Men]]'')
[[Evan Jonigkeit]] (''[[X-Men: Days of Future Past]]'')}} {{Quote|Toad has a wicked tongue, Senator. Just like you.|[[Magneto]] to [[Senator Robert Kelly]]|X-Men (film)}} '''Toad''' (born '''Mortimer Toynbee''') was a [[Mutant|mutant]] who had the ability to leap far distances, spit slime, and extend his tongue to 13 feet. ==Biography== ===Vietnam War=== Toad is first introduced as part of an American military unit along with [[Ink]], [[Havok]], and [[Daniels]] in Saigon, Vietnam. When [[Mystique]] fights the guards to save the mutants, Toad uses his long tongue to retrieve a gun from one of the guards. He leaves Vietnam along with the others. ===Brotherhood of Mutants=== [[File:Toad01-XM.png|left|thumb|250px|Toad working on [[Magneto]]'s machine.]] He is first seen working on [[Magneto]]'s machine, when [[Sabretooth]] returns after failing to retrieve [[Rogue]]. He and [[Mystique]] were then sent by Magneto to kidnap [[Senator Kelly]]. He is then present when Magneto tests his machine on Senator Kelly. Later, After Mystique (disguised as Bobby) tricks Rogue into leaving [[Professor X]]'s school, Magneto, Sabretooth and Toad head to the train station. While Magneto captures Rogue and knocks [[Wolverine]] out, Toad and Sabretooth take down [[Storm]] and [[Cyclops]]. Before they can get away, police are outside waiting for them but Magneto uses their guns against them. Professor X tries to mind control Sabretooth and Toad into making Magneto let go but Magneto threatens to kill the police officers which makes Professor X let go of Sabretooth and Magneto. Mystique arrives in a helicopter to pick them up and escape. [[File:Jean grey slimed .jpg|thumb|50px|[[Jean Grey]] suffering under Toad’s hardened slime spit.]] The Brotherhood arrives at the Statue of Liberty to use the machine on the humans before they find that the X-Men have arrived. Magneto tells Toad and Mystique to act as the first line of defense. Toad then ambushes Storm, Cyclops, and [[Jean Grey]] all at once, he starts by locking Cyclops in a display case, then grabs Storm’s wrist with his tongue and throws her onto the second floor. Jean Grey stops him in mid-air, but he spits slime at her, coating her face in his sticky, adhesive mucus. Storm gets up after hearing Jean’s distress, but Toad leaps up to the second level and is quickly kicks her down an elevator shaft. Toad sees Jean nearly suffocate under his slime before she’s freed by Cyclops. Storm flies up again and blows Toad out of the statue, his tongue latching onto a support beam to stay alive. However, Storm strikes his tongue with a lightning bolt, launching his body into the Hudson River. ==Personality== Toad is portrayed as an arrogant, brash and cocky character. He appears to enjoy mocking Sabretooth and does not seem to worry if Sabretooth will retaliate, in addition he is may be a fearless thrill seeker, mocking Sabretooth, whom most characters are terrified of. He appears to enjoy attacking three powerful X-men at once, kills multiple security guards around the Statue of Liberty, smiling whilst doing so and does not hesitate at stealing Cyclops' visor despite the obvious risk of getting shot at. He has a habit of acting immaturely, dancing as Jean tries to anticipate his next move and blowing a raspberry at Storm after drop kicking her down an elevator shaft. He can be considered to be quite impatient as he is visibly annoyed by the fact he could not kill the X-Men despite initially having an advantage. He enjoys killing and is mildly sadistic, as he devours a bird whole, sighs with delight whilst killing the security guards and did not hesitate to use a deliberately gross and slow attack to attempt to suffocate Jean. ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Flexible Bone Structure''': Toad's bone structure allows him to perform contortionist and gymnastic maneuvers without risk of spinal injury. He is usually seen sitting hunched, but this has no effect on his posture. *'''Prehensile Tongue''': [[File:Toad07-XM.png|thumb|250px|Toad using his prehensile tongue]] Toad had an elastic tongue that can stretch up to at least 13 feet. Akin to a whip, he can easily snatch targets, as he did to ensnare a small bird and draw it back in. *'''Slime Spit''': [[File:Toad spit.jpg|thumb|250px|Toad spit slime on [[Jean Grey]]'s face]] Toad once slimed Jean Grey, nearly smothering her. He spat a large blob of mucus into on [[Jean Grey]]'s face, splattering it with the nasty substance which blocked her nose and mouth and then solidified while also obscuring her vision and compromising her ability to use her telekinesis effectively. The slime’s adhesive properties were strong enough to prevent Jean from removing it manually. *'''Superhuman Agility''': He is more agile than what is naturally possible for a human, able to jump great distances from a stationary position. He could use this to traverse areas or climb about. He also uses his leg strength to crush anyone he lands on. *'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Toad can react faster than a normal human he able to attack three X-Men using his quick reflexes and dodge Cyclops optic blast just after stealing his visor. *'''Toxic Secretion''': Toad is able to kill a white dove instantly with his saliva. He then proceeds to consume it whole. His toxins can cause paralysis as well. *'''Wall Crawling''': Toad proved he can walk on walls due to a substance that is secreted from his skin. *'''Leaping Ability''': Toad possesses incredible strong legs which allow him to jump incredible strong heights. ===Abilities=== * '''Master Combatant''': Toad was able to single handedly take out the trained Cyclops, Storm and Jean Grey. *'''Engineer''': Toad is seen working on Magneto's machine. ==Relationships== ===Allies=== *[[Daniels]] - Former Army Teammate *[[Havok|Alex Summers/Havok]] - Former Army Teammate *[[Ink]] - Former Army Teammate *[[Brotherhood of Mutants]] - Former Teammates **﻿[[Magneto|Erik Lehnsherr/Magneto]] - Former Leader **[[Mystique]] - Savior **[[Sabretooth|Victor Creed/Sabretooth]] † ====Enemies==== *[[Senator Kelly]] † - Kidnap Victim and Enemy *[[William Stryker]] † - Enemy *[[X-Men]] - Enemies **[[Cyclops|Scott Summers/Cyclops]] † **[[Jean Grey]] † - Attempted Victim **[[Professor X|Charles Xavier/Professor X]] † **[[Rogue|Marie D'Ancanto/Rogue]] † - Kidnap Victim **[[Storm|Ororo Munroe/Storm]] † **[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] † ==Trivia== *﻿Toad was supposed to appear in ''[[X2: X-Men United]]'' fighting [[Nightcrawler]], but was cut out because of scheduling problems with [[Ray Park]]. *When Toad, [[Sabretooth]] and [[Magneto]] leave the train station, on his head is [[Cyclops' Visor]]. He used his tongue to steal it causing [[Cyclops]] to blow up part of the roof. *In ''[[X-Men: The Last Stand]]'', [[Anole]], possessing a very similar appearance to Toad, is seen crawling on the walls of the building the mutant meeting regarding the cure is located in, that Magneto later interrupts. *Despite being British in both the comics and original film. Toad is portrayed as an American in the Vietnam War during ''Days of Future Past''. ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Toad (comics)|Toad}} {{Navbox Brotherhood of Mutants}} [[Category:X-Men characters]] [[Category:X-Men: Days of Future Past characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine characters]] [[Category:X-Men: The Movie Prequel: Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:X-Men: The Movie Prequel: Magneto Characters]] [[Category:X-Men: The Official Game Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Male]] [[Category:Villains]] [[Category:Brotherhood of Mutants]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Storm]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Green Hair]] [[Category:Yellow Eyes]] [[Category:Green Skin]]
